finding_results.notes: The opening phone setup now explicitly carries all three inherited copied numbers (Nora, Theo, HR) before the first roadside-service call.

summary: All four structural/craft findings in the pass packet are resolved in chapter_03 with continuity-safe edits focused on causality, accountability pressure, and on-page consequence.
